patch.value: GH-293..296 CLI parser and search regression bundle

Fix fresh GitHub issues GH-293 schema unknown subcommands mutating types, GH-294 create --tags space-separated loss, GH-295 exact-ID keyword ranking, and GH-296 docs comma path parsing. Duplicate check covered open/closed/canceled pm search results before creation; related closed lineages include pm-ablm/pm-r2kd, pm-oqgf/pm-rkie, pm-cf1u/pm-klqo, and pm-jzf4.

author: codex-agent
message: Start bundled GH-293..296 regression fixes after live GitHub and all-status pm duplicate check.

value.text: Investigation note: GitHub sweep found open issues #293, #294, #295, #296 and no open PRs. pnpm audit --audit-level moderate reported no known vulnerabilities; pnpm outdated reports commander latest 15.0.0 but wanted/current 14.0.3, retained pending Node compatibility review.

CLI parser and search primitives handle schema unknown subcommands, multi-value create tags, exact dashed-ID searches, and comma-separated linked docs/files without data loss or unintended mutation.
